title: Platanitos Vintage
description: The original mod created by TeddiGamer where Platanitos come to life!
body:
![Background of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/109e8dbea966fdb31bc2b5f077217ca537bad8d3.png)

🍌 The original **Platanitos** mod from **2016**, created by TeddiGamer, is here! With all its plants, food, materials, minerals and even weapons and tools...

This iconic mod has been brought back to life so that everyone can enjoy the best food and its incredible secrets.

**Everything is possible in the world of Platanitos!**

![New plant.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a36fb43cb9ce19e1a032dfd642b4367fd1c5b73.png)

##

![About the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8afebca5c451878f7649bb8736e0dce38a038a27.png)

🍌 **Platanitos Vintage** brings to Minecraft the "Platanitos", an iconic food from content creator TeddiGamer.

Players will have to discover a new plant where to get the new food, opening a world of possibilities where a new object and a new mineral will be the protagonists of the strongest sword!

![New food.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9ddfbf0146a1a88b33b9d5e93fe5c428ad267f1.png)

##

![The content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96259c25a5289124276b2ab479c9f429e99c9f5f.png)

🍌 In **Platanitos Vintage** you can find:

- New foods.
- New plants.
- New objects.
- New minerals.
- New weapons and tools.

![New items.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39d18d1a58e0b529274af808af8f909410213317.png)

##

![The creator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce5b675a01aa206520f1d5a4d723f48e0f05d0c.png)

🍌 **TeddiGamer** is the creator of this crazy mod.

Being a video editor and also an image editor, he now also enters the vast world of mods.

**Follow me on my social networks!**
